originalTitle: Live RL dev on Pufferlib w/ Joseph Suarez
title: Benchmarking TinyGrad Beam Search and Kernel Generation for Small Networks
summary: Benchmarked TinyGrad's JIT and beam search against PyTorch compile and custom CUDA kernels for small neural networks. Found that TinyGrad often generates faster but shape-specific kernels, with inconsistent profiling results, while PyTorch compile performs poorly on small models.
